title: damam #1826
definition:
1) to be silent, be still, wait, be dumb, grow dumb
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be silent
        1a2) to be still, die
        1a3) to be struck dumb
    1b) (Niphal) to be silenced, be made silent, destroyed
    1c) (Poal) to make quiet
    1d) (Hiphil) to make silent (cause to die)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be silent, be still, wait, be dumb, grow dumb
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be silent
        1a2) to be still, die
        1a3) to be struck dumb
    1b) (Niphal) to be silenced, be made silent, destroyed
    1c) (Poal) to make quiet
    1d) (Hiphil) to make silent (cause to die)

    NASB:  to be or grow dumb, silent or still
